state.next-action:
Phase 38 shipped (2026-04-12): skill candidates auto-drafted from high-pressure phases. Phase 35 runtime telemetry foundation shipped (2026-04-12): trace schema v5 now stamps runtime identity into raw hook events, CLI logs, and TRACE scaffolds for Claude Code vs Codex attribution. Canonical repo-root skills/ source shipped (2026-04-12): command-backed gad-* skills and workspace skills now compile from one tree, with runtime install/transpilation sourced from skills/.
=== SHIPPED === - Restored shared model-profile resolution with default off semantics and workflow model emission in gad-tools init - Claude SDK sessions now use live-safe Claude aliases (sonnet / haiku / opus) instead of stale frozen model IDs - Added an opt-in live integration test for real model switching plus one-shot manual verification via SessionInit events - compute-self-eval.mjs now auto-drafts SKILL.md candidates for every high-pressure phase - 12 candidates landed in skills/candidates/ (phase-10, 12, 13, 14, 14.5, 17, 18, 20, 21, 22, 30, 34) - Candidates have status: candidate, category: System, origin: auto-drafted in frontmatter - Canonical skills now live at repo-root skills/ with COMMAND.md + skill.json for command-backed gad-* skills - gad install all --claude/--codex now installs from canonical skills/ and transpiles into runtime-native layouts - build-site-data.mjs, release support, and release-surface gating now read skills/ as the authored source of truth - gad-trace-hook now emits runtime metadata on each event; gad CLI logs now stamp runtime identity; TRACE scaffolds/from-log preserve runtime_identity
=== DECISIONS === GAD-D-144: Skill candidates quarantine and review workflow GAD-D-146: Claude-facing model profiles use aliases and stay off by default
=== NEXT === 1. Phase 39 (site DRY): 39-01 and 39-02 done. Next: 39-03 (dup grep audit) or 39-04–39-06 (medium). 2. Finish phase 35-03: surface runtime identity more explicitly in eval report/self-eval/site UI 3. Review upstream get-shit-done commits 596ce2d and 002bcf2 against the SDK/worktree roadmap 4. Execute phase 36 (per-eval repos + command split) 5. Manually review 12 candidates on the site and decide: promote, merge, or discard
=== SELF-EVAL (latest) === 3,516 events | 192 tasks (186 done) | 143 decisions Framework overhead: 23.6% | Loop compliance: 80% Skill candidates: 12
